summary: Employee One (1234) locked out of 2FA despite no 2FA configured — likely SEC-001 sibling bug
detail: Employee One (PIN 1234) attempted PIN login at 07:32:24. System responded with 2fa_required even though users.json shows totp_enabled=false, totp_secret=null. User submitted 5 rapid 2FA codes (07:32:30-07:32:43) all failing 'invalid_code', leading to 15min account lockout. The '2fa_login_success' event at 07:32:30 may indicate the PIN auth passed but was mis-logged. This is the same 2FA state persistence bug pattern as SEC-001 — system remembers 2FA is needed but the secret/key state was lost. Rate limiting worked correctly (locked at 5 attempts).

summary: 2FA state not persisted in users.json despite successful verification
detail: Owner (PIN 1111) successfully verified 2FA TOTP code at 07:13:35 UTC (backup_codes_count: 8). Activity log confirms '2fa_verify_success' event. However, users.json still shows totp_enabled=False, totp_secret=null. The 2FA setup appears to save correctly on initiation (totp_secret written), but the final verification save (setting totp_enabled=True) is lost or overwritten. Possible race condition or another process overwriting users.json. Owner may believe 2FA is active when it is not.

summary: Activity log truncated — 7 entries removed between 09:49 and 10:34 UTC
detail: Backup at 09:49 contained 112 activity_log entries. Current file has 105 entries. Missing 7 events spanning 09:07:57-09:45:05: (1) login_failed at 09:07:57 (Owner, localhost 127.0.0.1), (2) admin_login Owner at 09:07:59, (3) login Owner at 09:08:08, (4-5) login + admin_login Owner at 09:44:12-13, (6) clock_in Owner at 09:45:00, (7) clock_out Owner at 09:45:05. File reverted to state from ~08:06. Possible race condition in save_json_data (non-atomic read-modify-write) or intentional tampering. Cause unknown.

summary: Order 15 subtotal discrepancy — stored 29.53 vs actual item sum 34.00
detail: Order 15 submitted at 16:13:57 UTC by user null (no authenticated user). Stored subtotal is 29.53 but actual calculated subtotal from 48 items is 34.00. Total field (34.00) correctly matches item sum, but subtotal is 04.47 off. No tax, no tip, no discount applied. Payment: Cash. payment_splits: null. Possible calculation bug in price-override handling or subtotal not being recalculated when items are modified. Needs investigation.
User 2222 (Manager) was blocked. Reason: Test block from cron. All sessions invalidated.

summary: Shift at 22:36 missing activity log entry
detail: Employee One (1234) clocked in at 22:36:45 and out at 22:37:07 (shift_log.json confirmed), but activity_log.json has no entries after 21:57:33. No login, clock_in, or clock_out events recorded for this shift despite shift_log being updated. Pattern matches SEC-003 (activity log truncation). Shift occurred during off-hours window (22:00-06:00) from 127.0.0.1.
